title: Rebuilds Seeds Adam Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild's Seeds (Adam, Lilith) [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:09 am So, I got to thinking. I thought about a lot of things. And then this weird part of my brain made it all click. It starts here: Mari is Adam, not Kaworu. Kaworu (in 24) said that he could only pilot an Eva if its resident soul was in hiding. Look at the Eva's Mari has been piloting. Eva-05, a hideous monstrosity, and she turned Eva-02 on by sending it into Beast Mode. Perhaps the souls of these two Evas were pushed into agony so that Mari could take them over. She's so friendly with Evas because they're HER . Now, I couldn't understand why they wouldn't be pissy about her blowing up Eva-05 until I saw the poster in the Angel 2.0 thread. It mentions a character who hasn't been introduced yet. Perhaps Eva-05 was originally going to be his/her's, but had to be permanently converted for Adam. The destruction of Eva-05 means they can put the soul of the Eva elsewhere; perhaps Eva-08. Why is Mari destroying the Angels then, you ask? She's made a deal with Seele: Humanity is reduced to inconsequential goo, and she gets her planet back for her children to grow again. Obviously, we run into problems if Mari is Adam. For starters: How the hell is Kaworu surviving on the moon if he's a normal human? Conclusion: he isn't. So who is he? I puzzled over this one for a bit before a suggestion came: Kaworu is Lilith, not Rei (this is like musical chairs, I know). It puts a few things into context: First, Eva-06 is so similar to Eva-01 because they have the same proginitor (if Adam can pilot her clones, it makes sense for Lilith to be able to as well). There's the Father line I've heard about, and if Kaworu comes from Lilith, it makes sense. After all, Gendo would be responsible for that. Further, this gives Kaworu the opportunity to have previously met Shinji; when Shinji was watching Yui turn into a refreshing astronaut beverage. Perhaps Lilith, affected by Shinji's horror, agreed to recreate Yui in the form of Rei in an attempt to calm the boy. However, it didn't work, and Shinji remained the same: depressed. ("You never change..." "I'll make you happy this time") This also explains the multiple Rei's running around in the preview, they're all supplied from Lilith's Room of Guf (along with the souls of Eva-00 and -06). Rei is mostly emotionless because while she is physically Yui, her soul doesn't match up, but she is learning to get around this and this Rei's soul is beginning to care about Shinji and become used to the body. Gendo wants Shinji to grow closer to her because if she begins to care about people, she will be more willing to bring Shinji's mother back. In the end, Rei will transcend and do Rei stuff like in EoE. I still can't explain why they had Lilith speared much earlier, perhaps they screwed her over at some point... that would explain why they've got Kaworu locked up in a coffin on the moon until they needed him, and perhaps the coffins are in fact for clones, not Angels as thought). No, I have no idea what this all adds up to, but it does at least make the weird aspects of Webuild coherent... So, any thoughts on this batshit insane theory?

[]: Re: Rebuild's Seeds (Adam, Lilith) [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:21 am Legendary wrote: Now, I couldn't understand why they wouldn't be pissy about her blowing up Eva-05 until I saw the poster in the Angel 2.0 thread. It mentions a character who hasn't been introduced yet.

[]: Re: Rebuild's Seeds (Adam, Lilith) [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:25 am Reichu wrote: The poster isn't official, and the character in question is "Aihara-kun". In the movie, Misato tells Shinji that "Suzuhara-kun and (what sounds like) Aihara-kun" have been leaving messages for him. A bit peculiar, but it's plainly Kensuke and not some mystery character.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:43 am You could very well be correct. The "contract with lilith" as implied in 1.0 fits well with this. But how would you fit in the shot of Mari during third impact with this? She remains innert the entire time.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:46 am Combs wrote: You could very well be correct. The "contract with lilith" as implied in 1.0 fits well with this. But how would you fit in the shot of Mari during third impact with this? She remains innert the entire time.

[]: Re: Rebuild's Seeds (Adam, Lilith) [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:56 am Legendary wrote: Simple. Kaworu is meeting four people in 3.0, right? Mari's one of them. The other three are representations of the other Adams.

[]: Re: Rebuild's Seeds (Adam, Lilith) [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Jul 30, 2009 2:01 am Reichu wrote: If the "Seed of Life" premise has any bearing at all this time, why are there four of them?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Jul 30, 2009 6:15 am Interesting, very interesting. Though, about the whole Mari during almost-Third Impact thing: Legendary wrote: She's just letting humanity have this chance to clean up the mess because it's not really their fault.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jul 30, 2009 9:43 am 4 Adams and 4 lances...Kaworu I am going to guess is one of them but if there are 3 more then who are they? Mari "could" be one since I won't rule more or less anything out since this is Rebuild but I still think shes just a secret agent but you never know. Maybe Kaworu will come down and Mari and him can have it out for the love of Ikari.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:38 am Im thinking that Shinji could have the abilities of one and may be a decendant of one, just befoer he made unit 01 go Lagann, we did of course see the scene of only his eyes which like Kaworu and Rei, are red.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:51 am I think Kaworu & Mari could be 2 Adams (TWIN THEORY~~~), but who knows.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jul 30, 2009 11:54 am Everyone's an Adam! I don't believe Shinjis eyes were red due to him being an Adam. I believe it to be more of just a dramatic feature for the movie but I could always be wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jul 30, 2009 1:52 pm The "ADAMS" we see during Impacts are the FAR, and are just watching the creatures of Earth dick around. Mari and Kaworu are Adam and Lilith as this theory said, and when Lilith tried to create Rei, it thought it retrieved a soul from it's Room of Guf, but the Room of Guf is empty, and the only vessel that could contain a soul is Rei. Therefore, the Rei body was seized....by a FAR.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jul 30, 2009 3:39 pm Wut! Rebuild is so silly. I don't believe those are the FAR.
